//: Macro generates its own clocks internally; no external clock port.
//-DESIGN_IS_CORE: false -- this is a sub-macro intended to be placed inside project_macro
//-floorplan: Fixed absolute size. Estimate ~150 cells * ~3 um^2 = ~450 um^2 -> 30x30 with padding gives ~900 um^2.
//-synth: Keep hierarchy so the ring_osc cells stay visible during analysis.
//-routing: Drop CTS -- the only clock is the internally-generated RO output; OpenROAD CTS would try to balance fanout to clkdlybuf cells and break the oscillator.
